forecast-period.text: Clear. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h shifting south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the day then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon.

Slight chance of a shower in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southeasterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h shifting south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the early morning. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting southerly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny day. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Clear. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northeasterly in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southwesterly in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny day. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the day then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the morning. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny day. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly in the late afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the west. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending northeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Clear. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northeasterly in the late afternoon.

Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny day. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Clear. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.

Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to northwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Clear. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower near the coast in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Sunny. The chance of fog on and east of the ranges in the early morning. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then tending northeast to southeasterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.

Sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the day then tending northeast to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening.

Slight chance of a shower in the early morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the early morning. Sunny afternoon. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:00am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 32.

Mostly sunny day. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the evening. Winds east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning northerly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning then tending northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 25 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Clear. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h.

Slight chance of a shower in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the early morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the middle of the day then tending southeast to southwesterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly in the late afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny day. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Mostly sunny. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower later tonight. The chance of a thunderstorm near the west coast later this evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.

Slight chance of a shower in the early morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the early morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
No Rating

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning easterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Mostly sunny. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly clear. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the early morning. Mostly sunny day. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly in the middle of the day then tending east to northeasterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 29 to 34.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 35.

Sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Clear. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending southeasterly in the early afternoon then tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 32.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 32.

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly during the morning then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly during the morning then tending east to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
